title: Midnight Allspice Bruschetta
description: A rich and light German dish featuring ground allspice, perfect for those midnight cravings. Egg-free friendly.

ingredients.name: Allspice Powder
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use ground allspice rather than whole berries.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add garlic cloves and sauté until golden brown.
Fold in allspice powder, capers, chopped basil leaves, thyme, and rosemary. Season with salt and pepper.
Gently fold in fresh tomatoes without breaking them into smaller pieces.
Toast sliced baguette on a baking sheet until slightly crispy. Serve the mixture over toasted bread slices.
